description: Create a daily GitHub Actions workflow named macOS System CI that runs at 3 am and on pull requests to the master branch. Use a macOS job that installs dependencies, caches pyenv, installs Python 3.6.9 and pip packages, checks out the repository, caches third-party packages, builds BioDynaMo with custom CMake settings, runs system tests, and notifies Slack with a custom payload on workflow completion.
